ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the country is located */,
  "income_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the income group of the country */,
  "current_population" TEXT /* Current population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the country (people per square kilometer) */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual population growth rate */,
  "world_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the world population */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO 4217 currency code */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., democracy, monarchy) */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Primary time zone of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the country's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_income_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_group_id") REFERENCES income_groups ("income_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region's centroid */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the region's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_groups" (
  "income_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income group */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the income group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income group */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the income group (GNI per capita) */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the income group (GNI per capita) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the income group's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the population data is recorded */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country in that year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the population data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the population data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the population history data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_history_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the economic data is recorded */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "fertility_rate" REAL /* Fertility rate */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual GDP growth rate */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the economic data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the economic data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the economic indicators data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the demographic data is recorded */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of the population (e.g., 0-14, 15-64, 65+) */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of the population (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "urban_population" TEXT /* Number of people living in urban areas */,
  "rural_population" TEXT /* Number of people living in rural areas */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "dependency_ratio" REAL /* Dependency ratio (the ratio of dependents to working-age population) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the demographic data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the demographic data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_stats" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health statistics entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the health data is recorded */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy at birth */,
  "infant_mortality_rate" REAL /* Infant mortality rate (per 1,000 live births) */,
  "health_expenditure" REAL /* Total health expenditure (% of GDP) */,
  "physicians_per_1000" REAL /* Number of physicians per 1,000 people */,
  "healthcare_quality_index" REAL /* Numerical index indicating the quality of healthcare */,
  "hospital_beds_per_1000" REAL /* Number of hospital beds per 1,000 people */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the health data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the health data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the health statistics data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_stats_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_stats" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education statistics entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the education data is recorded */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate (percentage of the population aged 15 and above who can read and write) */,
  "school_enrollment_rate" REAL /* School enrollment rate (percentage of the population of the appropriate age enrolled in school) */,
  "higher_education_rate" REAL /* Higher education rate (percentage of the population of the appropriate age enrolled in higher education) */,
  "teacher_student_ratio" REAL /* Average teacher-student ratio */,
  "primary_school_enrollment" REAL /* Percentage of primary school enrollment */,
  "secondary_school_enrollment" REAL /* Percentage of secondary school enrollment */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the education data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the education data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the education statistics data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_stats_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the country data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the country data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
